/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsrv_pkg__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsrv_pkg__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/srv_pkg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/srv_pkg/srv/detail/joint_conversion__description.c.o CMakeFiles/srv_pkg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/srv_pkg/srv/detail/joint_conversion__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/srv_pkg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/srv_pkg/srv/detail/joint_conversion__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
